column1: Exercise (1-6), {p} Modern industry has caused damage to our natural 3*environment* in many ways. The air and water are filled with 3*pollutants*. One result of this is acid rain, which has caused 3*extensive* damage to vegetation in many areas. When large amounts of vegetation die off, the environment loses 3*stability*. If there are no plants to hold the soil, it starts to 3*erode*. This leads to myriad problems, including water pollution and habitat loss. 3*Defenders* of wildlife work hard to prevent further damage to natural areas.

column1: Exercise (8-12), {p} Birds are 10*fascinating* to many people, and bird watching is a popular hobby. The best time to watch birds is in the early morning, because birds are usually very active at that time of day. The 10*observer* must keep still and quiet in order not to frighten the birds away. If you live in a part of the world where 10*migratory* birds spend their breeding season, then you will have the opportunity to see nest-building activity. Over the ages, different species of birds have 10*evolved* with different types of nest-building skills. It makes an interesting study to look at the different types of nests built by birds and to watch them as they build their nests. After the breeding season is over and the babies have left the nest, it is time for the birds to head for warmer parts of the world to spend the winter months. Birds 10*navigate* to their winter feeding grounds, using the stars or the sun as their guide.

column1: Exercise (14-19), {p} Desert plants have a variety of 1*adaptations* that allow them to endure the desert environment. Because a desert is 1*extremely* dry, plants need to be able to take in as much water as possible when it rains and to store the water for a long time. Special root systems and types of leaves enable them to do this. Another source of 1*stress* in a desert is the high temperature, so desert plants need to have 1*resilience*. 1*Violent* storms can occur in a desert, and plants with strong roots will be able to endure the storms. Considering the difficult conditions in a desert, the 1*diversity* of plants that can be found there is truly amazing.

column1: Exercise (21-26), {p} In order to 6*perform* well, an athlete must have a number of different abilities. Naturally, she should 6*demonstrate* excellent physical skills. column1: Exercise (35-40), {p} It is crucial to acknowledge the importance of leisure-time activities. They are not merely a way to use up free time. They are important for our physical and 11*emotional* health. We need to choose activities that rest our minds and bodies so that we can feel rejuvenated when we return to work and can do our jobs more 11*industriously*. Some people enjoy 11*intellectual* pastimes — other people choose different sorts of leisure-time activities. The key is to be 11*deliberate* about choosing a pastime that is active rather than passive. Many people feel 11*reluctant* to be physically active after a tiring week at work. However, 11*authorities* tell us that this is actually the best way to decrease stress and relax.
